title: eragrostis leersiiformis
intro: Eragrostis leersiiformis, also known as 'Kurura', is a type of perennial grass native to Africa. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eragrostis leersiiformis include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by boiling the leaves or roots in water, and it is also used in traditional African medicine to make teas and infusions.
